summary:
✅ **Success**

- **Researched 5 new papers** from arXiv on context engineering for AI agents, focusing on frameworks like **RAG 2.0**, **memory-augmented architectures**, and **dynamic context window optimization**.
- **Identified 3 trending frameworks** from Hugging Face and GitHub, including **LongLLaMA**, **MemGPT**, and **Contextual AI**.
- **Compiled a technical summary** detailing their methodologies, applications, and limitations.
- **Updated the Confluence page** with the latest findings, ensuring structured sections for each approach and references.
- **Posted the update** to the `#openclaw #cron` Telegram topic with a summary of key insights.

✅ **Done.** Updated the Confluence research page with 9 new high-impact papers across 4 categories (Agentic Frameworks, Memory Management, Context Compression, and Retrieval-Augmented CE), restructured the page into clearer sections, and posted the summary to Telegram topic #729.
✅ Done. Updated the Confluence page with 5 high-impact new papers (CMV, FluxMem, AgentSys, ASEntmax, CoRAG/Attn-GS/ReMemR1) and posted the summary to Telegram topic 729.

🧠 Weekly Context Engineering Research Update ✅ Success — 8 new high-impact papers added (page now covers 35+ papers total) **What's new this week:** • ⭐ **Pichay — Demand Paging for LLM Context** (arXiv:2603.09023) — "The context window is L1 cache, not memory." Production-deployed demand paging proxy achieves 93% context reduction with 0.025% fault rate. The most precise OS-to-LLM mapping yet. • ⭐ **Git Context Controller (GCC)** (arXiv:2508.00031) — Git-inspired COMMIT/BRANCH/MERGE for agent memory. SOTA on SWE-Bench Verified (80%+), outperforming 26 existing systems. Now open-source. • ⭐ **Memex(RL)** (arXiv:2603.04257) — RL-trained indexed memory: compress experience without discarding evidence. Agent learns what/when to archive and retrieve under context budgets. • **OpenDev** (arXiv:2603.05344) — Practical coding agent blueprint with 5 context engineering techniques: lazy tool discovery, adaptive compaction, event-driven reminders, dual-agent planning/execution split. • **ACC — Agent Cognitive Compressor** (arXiv:2601.11653) — Bio-inspired bounded memory that separates "what the agent can look up" from "what it treats as ground truth." Prevents memory poisoning. • **Aeon** (arXiv:2601.15311) — Neuro-symbolic memory OS solving "Vector Haze" (semantic ≠ contextual relevance). Sub-5μs retrieval with SIMD-accelerated indices. • **Beyond the Context Window** (arXiv:2603.04814) — Fact-based memory vs long-context cost analysis: memory systems break even after just ~10 turns at 100K tokens. • **CE as Enterprise Discipline** (arXiv:2603.09619) — Maturity model: Prompt Engineering → Context Engineering → Intent Engineering → Specification Engineering. **Key insight:** The OS metaphor for context management is moving from theory to production. Pichay and GCC both validate it with real-world metrics. 📄 View on Confluence
